description: Redesigned and developed online academy website for Sepehr Academy and its admin panel with a small team using React.js, Axios, TailwindCSS. i designed user interface with Adobe XD myself. this website contained courses and course pages, login and register page, admin panel, articles, etc... also features like applying and

Led the frontend team in designing and developing a responsive website using Figma, ensuring brand consistency and cross-browser compatibility. Integrated frontend components with Laravel, utilizing Tailwind CSS for rapid styling and clean code. Managed tasks via Jira, optimizing website performance through regular

Collaborating on Raysa, a school management web app using React, developing new features, refactoring into reusable components, and ensuring performance, accessibility, and seamless backend integration.

Built a responsive AI voice assistant app with React, Zustand, Retell AI, and Material UI, featuring real-time interaction, custom state management, and Framer Motion animations. Developed a REST-based chatbot widget with a live feel and contributed to scalable architecture and UI/UX design.
